My friend Musty Mustard and I like to drink good rum.

 

We usually drink over at Musty’s house.

Which is located inside the Concord MA Town House.

Isn’t that special?

Kind of special similar to how Alice lives in the church bell tower, in the song “Alice’s Restaurant”.

 

#0172 - Concord MA Good Rum  |  https://lemonmama.com/lemonmama/2025/0172%20concord%20ma%20good%20rum.html

 

Musty and I are getting together today, for drinks and conversation.

I bring this today for us to drink:

 

“Our Daily Red 1.5L Box wine”  |  https://www.kroger.com/p/our-daily-red-box-red-wine/0079178490150

 

Our Daily Red wine now available in a box.

 

Not just in a bottle.

 

Based on description and understanding, it allows one to dispense the wine fresh over 4 weeks instead of just over 1 day.

 

Yep so we tried it, and here is the picture...

 

-

 

-

 

 

...Verdict is, smooth, yummy, easy to dispense, and now also enjoyable to enjoy one same box, across many days, without worrying of spoilage.

 

In conclusion, yep, this 1.5 liter box of Our Daily... wines is delicious, similar to the bottled format of the same wine. It is one of the best wines I’ve had. So smooth and yummy. So if you like a smooth and yummy red wine, then try it out!
